label: Go Docs: current package (serve + open)
args:
set -euo pipefail
cd "$(dirname "$ZED_FILE")"
pkg="$(go list .)"

if command -v pkgsite >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  pkill -f "pkgsite -http=:6060" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
  nohup pkgsite -http=:6060 >/tmp/zed-pkgsite.log 2>&1 &
  sleep 1
  open "http://localhost:6060/${pkg}"
elif command -v godoc >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  pkill -f "godoc -http=:6060" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
  nohup godoc -http=:6060 >/tmp/zed-godoc.log 2>&1 &
  sleep 1
  open "http://localhost:6060/pkg/${pkg}"
else
  echo "Neither pkgsite nor godoc is installed. Falling back to CLI docs + pkg.go.dev."
  echo
  go doc . || true
  echo
  echo "To run a local docs site, install one of:"
  echo "  go install golang.org/x/pkgsite/cmd/pkgsite@latest"
  echo "  go install golang.org/x/tools/cmd/godoc@latest"
  open "https://pkg.go.dev/${pkg}" || true
fi

label: Go to file:line[:col]
args:
set -euo pipefail
if ! ref=$(osascript -e 'text returned of (display dialog "Enter target (file:line[:col] or file:start-end)" default answer ".notes/spec.md:85-91")' 2>/dev/null); then
  exit 0
fi

[[ -z "$ref" ]] && exit 0

file=${ref%%:*}
rest=""
if [[ "$ref" == *:* ]]; then rest=${ref#*:}; fi

line=1
col=1
if [[ -n "$rest" ]]; then
  if [[ "$rest" == *-* ]]; then
    line=${rest%-*}
  elif [[ "$rest" == *:* ]]; then
    line=${rest%%:*}
    col=${rest##*:}
  else
    line=$rest
  fi
fi

zed "${file}:${line}:${col}"

label: planner
args: eval "$(mise activate bash)"; exec claude --agent planner

label: implementer
args: eval "$(mise activate bash)"; exec claude --agent implementer --model sonnet

label: golangci-lint: current file
args:
set -euo pipefail
if [[ -z "${ZED_FILE:-}" ]]; then echo "ZED_FILE not set" >&2; exit 1; fi
file_dir="$(cd "$(dirname "$ZED_FILE")" && pwd)"
mod_dir="$file_dir"
while [[ "$mod_dir" != "/" && ! -f "$mod_dir/go.mod" ]]; do
  mod_dir="$(dirname "$mod_dir")"
done
if [[ ! -f "$mod_dir/go.mod" ]]; then echo "no go.mod found above $file_dir" >&2; exit 1; fi
rel="${file_dir#$mod_dir/}"
[[ "$rel" == "$file_dir" ]] && rel="."
cd "$mod_dir"
echo "module: $mod_dir"
echo "linting: ./$rel"
golangci-lint run "./$rel"
